visual-anti-patterns.notes: One anti-pattern: object palette labels and AI suggestion chip text in the builder appear below 16px; no gradient backgrounds, orbs, nested cards, or cluttered dashboards observed

visual-child-friendly.notes: Playful tone with emojis, friendly AI buddy, large CTA buttons, calm lavender palette, but category tabs and suggestion chips in the builder are slightly small for young fingers

visual-consistency.notes: Consistent purple accent, rounded corners, button styles, and type ramp across all pages; minor drift with two unlabeled icon buttons in the builder toolbar

visual-accessibility.notes: Good primary text contrast and text labels on most controls, but no visible focus rings in any screenshot, two icon-only buttons lack labels, and gray subtitle text appears borderline on contrast
